title: Accessibility
description: 6 requirement cards in 2x3 grid, contrast table, ARIA specification table

sections.requirements: Exactly 6 cards in a 2x3 grid layout. Each card has: title, icon color (red/blue/green/grey/orange), body text explaining the requirement, and optional code snippet with syntax-highlighted tokens. The 6 cards must cover these topics (adapt to component): Role & semantics, Keyboard navigation, Screen reader announcements, Focus management, Color & contrast, Touch targets / motion / responsive.
sections.contrastTable: WCAG contrast check for every foreground/background color pair in the component. Include: element name, foreground hex, background hex, contrast ratio, and Pass/Fail/Exempt verdict. Disabled states are Exempt.
sections.ariaTable: ARIA specification rows for each interactive element. Include: element name, ARIA role, label method (aria-label, aria-labelledby, etc), focus order number, keyboard interaction, and screen reader announcement text.

qualityRules: requirements must have EXACTLY 6 items — no more, no less (2x3 grid layout)
Each requirement must have a code snippet with syntax-highlighted tokens when demonstrating HTML/ARIA patterns
contrastTable must include ALL text/background pairs, including Error and Disabled states
Disabled state text is WCAG Exempt, not Fail — mark accordingly
ariaTable keyboard column must describe the actual key (Tab, Enter, Space, Arrow keys) and what it does
ariaTable announcement must be the literal text a screen reader would speak
icon colors: red for semantic/role, blue for keyboard, green for screen reader, grey for focus, orange for contrast/touch
